hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE "eyJhbG|sbp_|service_role|SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN=|sk-ant-|ghp_|gho_"; then echo "BLOCKED: Do not write secrets into source files. Use .env or environment variables." >&2; exit 2; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -q '\.sql$'; then echo 'NOTE: Migration file written. Run this in Supabase SQL Editor at https://supabase.com/dashboard/project/jlvxubslxzwmzslvzgxs/sql'; fi
